concept: Craft a shooter where projectiles are actually tiny autonomous drones that can be redirected mid-flight with secondary commands, potentially hitting multiple targets with a single shot. Basic ammunition follows gentle curves when redirected, while advanced variants can make sharp turns, hover temporarily, or split into multiple sub-munitions. Environmental interactions allow creative solutions - bullets can be sent around obstacles, through reaction-triggering elements, or used to activate distant mechanisms. Strategic depth comes from managing your limited control bandwidth, as simultaneously guiding multiple projectiles divides your attention and reduces steering precision for each. The ultimate challenge involves navigating a single special projectile through an elaborate security system with perfect precision to neutralize a previously unreachable target.
